title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd!
